revision.comment: Bot: migrate talk page structure; import discussion seed (en:Genkan); add local discussion section + dated import note
revision.text: {{talk page header}} == Local discussion == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:37, 26 February 2026 (UTC) == Imported from English Wikipedia (2026-02-26, [https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:PermanentLink/1202248227 revision]) == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:37, 26 February 2026 (UTC) {{WikiProject banner shell|class=Start| {{WikiProject Japan|importance=High|attention=yes}} {{WikiProject Architecture |importance=Low}} }} ==Good photo on JAWP== (There is a good [[:ja:ファイル:Old komoro-honjin-omoya02s3872.jpg|picture]] in the Japanese () WP. But for the moment I inserted another image, that I made some years ago in Korea. Of course, a photo of a ''Japanese genkan'' would be more useful) —Preceding [[Wikipedia:Signatures|unsigned]] comment added by [[User:95.114.23.82|95.114.23.82]] ([[User talk:95.114.23.82|talk]] • [[Special:Contributions/95.114.23.82|contribs]]) 22:45, 1 January 2009 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:37, 26 February 2026 (UTC) == Great idea! == :''Title added to give a section'' i think these are great traditional japanese doorways. the taking off of shoes would also help with a cleaner house!!!! :''Unsigned comment of 01:26, 2007 September 24 by [[121.217.152.56]]'' [[ja:玄関]] :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:37, 26 February 2026 (UTC)

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] previous contributors were [[User:en>Bruce1ee]], [[User:Immanuelle]], [[User:EmmaBot]], see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Genkan here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{talk page header}} == Local discussion == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:37, 26 February 2026 (UTC) == Imported from English Wikipedia (2026-02-26, [https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:PermanentLink/1202248227 revision]) == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:37, 26 February 2026 (UTC) {{WikiProject banner shell|class=Start| {{WikiProject Japan|importance=High|attention=yes}} {{WikiProject Architecture |importance=Low}} }} ==Good photo on JAWP== (There is a good [[:ja:ファイル:Old komoro-honjin-omoya02s3872.jpg|picture]] in the Japanese () WP. But for the moment I inserted another image, that I made some years ago in Korea. Of course, a photo of a ''Japanese genkan'' would be more useful) —Preceding [[Wikipedia:Signatures|unsigned]] comment added by [[User:95.114.23.82|95.114.23.82]] ([[User talk:95.114.23.82|talk]] • [[Special:Contributions/95.114.23.82|contribs]]) 22:45, 1 January 2009 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:37, 26 February 2026 (UTC) == Great idea! == :''Title added to give a section'' i think these are great traditional japanese doorways. the taking off of shoes would also help with a cleaner house!!!! :''Unsigned comment of 01:26, 2007 September 24 by [[121.217.152.56]]'' [[ja:玄関]] :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:37, 26 February 2026 (UTC)
